返回本批次

PiCore - Tiny Core Linux 的 Raspberry Pi 端口

PiCore - Raspberry Pi Port of Tiny Core Linux

tinycorelinux.net 作者 gregsadetsky 分数 86 评论 10 2026/04/16 03:45
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 简介============
  2. piCore 是 Tiny Core Linux 的 Raspberry Pi 端口，它是一个由 Robert Shingledecker 构建的独立系统，现在由一个小型开发团队开发，并得到了强大的社区支持。
  3. Tiny Core Linux 不是一个传统的发行版，而是一个用于创建您自己的定制系统的工具包。它不仅提供灵活性、占用空间小，而且提供最新的内核和应用程序集，使其成为定制系统、设备以及专门在 Raspberry Pi 上学习 Linux 的理想选择。
  4. 概念=======
  5. piCore 完全在 RAM 中运行。启动后不使用启动介质，也不存在传统意义上的安装。

Original Summary

  1. Introduction ============
  2. piCore is the Raspberry Pi port of Tiny Core Linux, which is an independent system architected by Robert Shingledecker and now developed by a small team of developers with strong community support.
  3. Tiny Core Linux is not a traditional distribution but a toolkit to create your own customized system. It offers not only flexibility, small footprint but a very recent kernel and set of applications making it ideal for custom system, appliances as well as to learn Linux specially on the Raspberry Pi.
  4. Concept =======
  5. piCore is running entirely in RAM. Boot media is not used after boot and there is no installation in conventional terms.

评论（默认中文）

eccgecko 2026/04/16 10:19
是否可以从现有系统启动并使用 PiCore 通过管道 dd 到 nc 来进行完整的系统备份？

读完后 https://askubuntu.com/questions/1416758/remote-full-system-b... 我一直在考虑是否要在我远程管理的一些实时无头 pi 上尝试这一点，但一直担心在没有测试系统的情况下尝试它。

似乎启动 PiCore 对于这种情况来说是完美的。您甚至可以使用 rpi 在过去一年中引入引导加载程序的一些 A/B 尝试引导功能，并且基本上具有一种实时恢复操作系统。我很想知道这是否可能。

过去几周我一直在思考这个问题，然后这个关于 PiCore 的 HN 帖子就在我再次查看那个 askubuntu 帖子的那天突然出现了！我把它当作一个标志......

Would it be possible to boot into this from an existing system and use PiCore to take a full system backup by piping dd to nc?

After reading https://askubuntu.com/questions/1416758/remote-full-system-b... I’ve been debating whether to try this out on some of my live headless pi’s that I manage remotely, but have been worried to try it without a test system first.

Seems like booting into PiCore could be perfect for this scenario. You could even use some of the A/B try-boot functionality that rpi have introduced into the bootloader over the past year, and basically have a kind of live recovery os. Would love to know if that could be possible.

Been mulling this over for the past couple weeks and then this HN post about PiCore pops-up literally day I was going over that askubuntu post again! I’m taking it as a sign…..

在 HN 中查看
cas 2026/04/16 04:52
一个非常聪明的不可变 Linux 发行版，是优秀的 PiCorePlayer 的基础，我最喜欢在任何 Pi 上运行 Squeezebox 客户端（和/或 Lyrion 音乐服务器）

https://picoreplayer.org/

A very clever immutable Linux distro, and is the basis for the excellent PiCorePlayer, a favourite of mine to run Squeezebox clients (and/or Lyrion music server) on any Pi

https://picoreplayer.org/

pgwalsh 2026/04/16 10:23
我将 rsgain 添加到 piCorePlayer 中。应该在最新的存储库中。 IMO 非常实用。
I added rsgain to piCorePlayer. Should be in the latest repository. Great utility IMO.

philips 2026/04/16 05:45
很想把它连接到 Zaparoo。我非常喜欢使用 Zaparoo + Jellyfin 来避免在观看电影和节目时出现菜单混乱。
Would love to hook this up to Zaparoo. I have really enjoyed using Zaparoo + Jellyfin to avoid menu diving when watching movies and shows.

alsetmusic 2026/04/16 05:37
多年来，TinyCoreLinux 在我心中占有特殊的位置。这让我想从书呆子的储物箱里拿出一些小学生。
TinyCoreLinux has had a special place in my heart for years. This makes me wanna break out some of the pis from nerdy storage bins.

weikju 2026/04/16 08:22
如果 TinyCore 的设计敏感性能够比 ostree 怪物获得更多关注就好了
If only TinyCore’s design sensibilities had garnered more attention over the ostree monstrosity
在 HN 中查看
oso2k 2026/04/16 10:14
作为一个喜欢并使用 TinyCoreLinux 和 PiCore 的人，我这么说，TCL 有一些令人麻木的方式来实现不变性。 我将此归因于 Linux 和不变性有时会相互争用。 许多 Linux 代码都假设路径是可写的。
I say this as someone who likes and use TinyCoreLinux and PiCore, there are some mind numbing ways TCL makes immutability work. I chalk this up to Linux and immutability being sometimes in contention with each other. Lots of Linux code make assumptions paths being writable.
